## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on conference planning and coordination between GrowthX and Webstacks for an upcoming October event.](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Venue secured: Chase Above the Rim's heated rooftop (negotiating price)](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Event details: 3-hour happy hour, passed hors d'oeuvres, open bar, \~100-150 guests](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Estimated budget: $25k-$30k (including \~$7k in fees)](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Action items: Finalize guest lists, decide on third-party involvement (Sanity?), confirm venue details](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Venue and Logistics

  - [Chase Above the Rim secured as venue (heated rooftop)](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [3-hour event with 2 hours of passed hors d'oeuvres](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Noise ordinance prevents live music/DJ](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Aiming for 100-150 guests](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Open bar ($15-$20 per drink, \~$9k budget)](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Total estimated cost: $25k-$30k (including \~$7k in fees)](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Guest List and Invitations

  - [Using Luma for event management and audience building](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Targeting existing leads, customers, warm prospects, and cold outreach](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Webstacks bringing 10-12 clients, 150 warm prospects](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [GrowthX has 50+ leads, 100-200 prospects](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Emphasis on quality over quantity for attendees](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Marketing Strategy

  - [Event positioned as awareness and conversion tool](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Success metric: 1-2 closed deals per company](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Leveraging existing clients for referrals and social proof](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Cold outreach highlighting high-profile attendees](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

  - [Webstacks contributing $10k-$15k to budget](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Both companies to share target lists and prospects](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [GrowthX offering to handle outreach campaigns if needed](https://fathom.video/share/AnurhufzE8p6EZhXTVHkEzNELjdHPQyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
